name: consumption trace: /audit-pack reads standards_state across all per-commit manifests and emits an aggregate Standards Freshness section (per C-10)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && for sha in abc123 def456; do printf '{"commit":"%s","standards_state":{"google-tsguide":{"freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency"}}}' "$sha" > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/$sha.json; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section standards-freshness && grep -E "Standards Freshness" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep -E "google-tsguide" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
